name: new-skill
description: Bootstrap a new skill scaffold with deterministic, bounded, explicit-input authoring rules.

name.description: Required explicit skill name in kebab-case; do not infer or invent it.

description.description: Optional one-line summary for the skill; keep it concrete and implementation-neutral.

template.description: Scaffold shape. Current runtime stays doc-first; use README guidance for deterministic ops/full extensions only when explicitly needed.
